# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **Engine bug fixes and leak fix**

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 merges upstream Skia m151 bug fixes and patches a native resource leak. The bundled Skia engine receives another round of upstream chrome/m151 bug fixes, and a native handle leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData is now corrected.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Upstream Skia m151 bug fixes merged** — A second sync from the chrome/m151 upstream branch brings additional rendering bug fixes and stability improvements across all platforms. ([#4443](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4443))

## Bug Fixes

- **Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData fixed** — SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) was not releasing the underlying native image handle when the subset decode produced a new object, causing a handle leak. This is now corrected. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))
